message:
feat(scrollback): add tiered scrollback location hints, cold metadata,
and pane status telemetry plumbing

End-to-end plumbing for tiered scrollback observability and fine-grained
offset resolution, from screen internals through the mux protocol to the
client renderer:

scrollback_tiers.rs:
- Add ScrollbackLocationHint enum (Hot/Warm/Cold) with page index,
  page offset, line index, and page line count for each tier
- Add ColdPageMeta struct for retaining page metadata after eviction
- Add cold: VecDeque<ColdPageMeta> to TieredScrollback
- Implement locate_offset() for resolving offset-from-end to concrete
  tier/page/line location
- Extract evict_warm_page() helper, update evict_all_warm() and
  enforce_warm_cap() to populate cold metadata
- Add tests: locate_offset for hot, warm, cold tiers

screen.rs:
- Extract apply_cold_spill_outcome() from record_scrollback_spill()
  to share cold-spill accounting between budget overflow and manual
  eviction paths
- Add evict_all_warm() to ScrollbackTieringState
- Add evict_warm_scrollback() public API for fleet-level memory
  actions (EvictWarmScrollback, emergency cleanup)
- Add tests: evict flushes warm lines, noop when no warm residency

mux plumbing (renderable.rs, pane.rs, localpane.rs, termwiztermtab.rs):
- Add PaneTieredScrollbackStatus struct with 17 telemetry fields
- Implement From<TermTieredScrollbackStatus> conversion
- Add get_tiered_scrollback_status() to Pane trait (default: None)
- Implement for LocalPane and TermWizTerminalPane
- Add conversion test

codec (lib.rs):
- Add tiered_scrollback_status to GetPaneRenderableDimensionsResponse
  and GetPaneRenderChangesResponse

session handler:
- Plumb tiered_scrollback_status through PerPane change detection
  and response construction

client (renderable.rs):
- Accept and store tiered_scrollback_status from render deltas
- Add get_tiered_scrollback_status() accessor

bench fixtures:
- Add tiered_scrollback_status: None to mux_client_ops and
  pdu_pipelining bench response constructors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

             pixel_height: 0,
             reverse_video: false,
         },
+        tiered_scrollback_status: None,
         dirty_lines: Vec::new(),
         title: "bench".to_string(),
         working_dir: None,

             pixel_height: 0,
             reverse_video: false,
         },
+        tiered_scrollback_status: None,
         dirty_lines: Vec::new(),
         title: format!("pane-{pane_id}"),
         working_dir: None,
